attribution.name: SpyglassMC/vanilla-mcdoc

attribution.name: misode/misode.github.io

entries.title: Vanilla datapack schema sources
entries.summary: Explains that vanilla datapack JSON shape should be derived from Spyglass vanilla-mcdoc schemas, while generator/editor behavior should be checked against misode source files before writing version-sensitive JSON.
